name: microsoft-teams
description: Reads Microsoft Teams users, groups, channels, and device-usage reports through the Microsoft Graph REST API using an OAuth2 client-credentials grant. Read-only.

risk.read: external Microsoft Graph API read of tenant users/groups/channels/device-usage data

conformance.reason: Every stream is StreamHook-handled (hooks/microsoft-teams/hooks.go ports legacy's @odata.nextLink absolute-URL pagination loop verbatim; the engine's declarative next_url_path pagination reads its cursor via connsdk.StringAt's dotted-path parser, which cannot address the literal dotted key "@odata.nextLink" at all -- see docs.md's Streams notes and docs/migration/quarantine.json's microsoft-teams ENGINE_GAP entry). hook-covered; proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/microsoft-teams (TestParityMicrosoftTeams_UsersNextLinkPagination) and internal/connectors/hooks/microsoft-teams/hooks_test.go.
